consumer_complaint_narrative: I was charged a late fee even though I paid on time and my account shows no missed payments.
The mortgage servicer never applied my escrow payment and now demands additional funds.
Unauthorized transaction appeared on my checking account and the bank refuses to refund it.
Debt collector called repeatedly after I sent a dispute letter and continued to harass me.
My student loan servicer misapplied my payment and now says I'm delinquent.
The credit card company raised my interest rate without notice and I cannot afford the payment.
I received repeated calls about a debt that is not mine and the creditor refuses to investigate.
The bank closed my account without warning and I lost access to my direct deposits.
